title: preferences config
description: Shape of config/preferences.yaml: structured narrowing/ranking signals for offer search. Every field only NARROWS or RANKS within config/sources.yaml — it can never widen the boards/geos/languages allow-list. The subset-of-sources.yaml invariant is NOT expressed here (JSON Schema cannot reference another file); it is enforced by scripts/preferences/validate_preferences.py. additionalProperties:false is scoped to leaf objects ONLY (salary/work_conditions/scope), never the root.

salary.description: Minimum compensation signal. Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY.

work_conditions.description: Work-arrangement signals. Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY.

scope.description: Scope-axis narrowing block. Each array MUST be a subset of the matching config/sources.yaml array — enforced at runtime by validate_preferences.py (the subset rule is not expressible in JSON Schema). Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY.

preferences.description: Ranked free-form soft preferences (first = highest priority).

ranking.description: Optional free-form numeric weights for ranking signals.
